items.title: Admire space engineering with LEGO’s Technic NASA Artemis rocket + 3-stage separation at new $48 low
items.summary:
LEGO Technic NASA Artemis Space Launch System Rocket set

Buy for $48 (Reg. $60)

What we love

If you are an astronomy lover, a STEM builder, or just love the Technic theme in general, this LEGO set is a great steal while down at a new $48 low price. Stacking up to 632 pieces, you’ll recreate a brick-built rendition of the NASA Artemis rocket, complete with its three-stage separation design: solid rocket boosters, core stage, then upper stage with Orion spacecraft.

items.title: Segway’s Early Prime deals take up to 50% off e-scooters + up to $405 extra savings, like the Max G2 scooter at $595, more
items.summary: Keeping pace with the $1,400 off Segway Xyber e-bike and extra battery bundle, as well as the new low price hitting the Xafari e-bike, Segway has also launched its Early Prime e-scooter deals, which can get up to $405 in bonus extra savings playing the on-page game (more on this below). The model receiving the biggest post-game deal (which took me one shot to earn) is Segway’s Max G2 Electric Scooter down at $594.99 shipped, after using the provided savings code at checkout, beating out Amazon by $155. Down from its $1,400 MSRP directly, and normally going for $1,000 at full price elsewhere, we’ve mostly seen discounts landing the costs between $750 and $700 in 2026, though there was an earlier fall to $650. After winning the simple on-page game, you score a $405 markdown off the going rate (and $805 off the MSRP) that lands it at the best price we have seen in 2026 and the second-lowest overall, beaten out by a one-time drop to $530 back in 2025. You can head below to browse the full lineup of deals.

items.title: Beats headphones up to $220 off at Best Buy right now, buds from $50
items.summary: Best Buy is landing this month ahead of Father’s Day and graduation celebrations with some deep deals across the Beats headphone and earbud lineup. We are looking at up to $190 off the list price on over-ear options alongside in-ear options starting down at $60, but we are also tracking some solid “excellent” condition open-box deals we wanted to highlight that can bring your spend down even more – some sets are as much as $220 off the new list price right now.

items.title: Qualcomm wants to be the chip inside whatever replaces your smartphone, and it just announced two products toward that end
items.summary: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said Tuesday that the company is working on over 40 different AI wearable devices — including jewelry, earbuds with cameras, pins, and watches — a sign of how aggressively the chipmaker is betting that the next major computing platform won't be a phone.

items.title: Rechargeable Find My wallet trackers don’t get much less than this, score UGREEN’s new FineTrack Slim for just $18 (All-time low)
items.summary:
UGREEN FineTrack Slim Find My Wallet tracker

Buy for $18 (Reg. $25)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

This updated FineTrack Slim card tracker comes with a rechargeable battery that can be topped up using a MagSafe or other Qi-compatible wireless charger. It works with Apple’s Find My network, and you get features like real-time location tracking, IP68 water resistance, and a 100dB speaker for locating your misplaced wallet.

items.summary:
LEGO Super Mario The Bowser Express Train set

Buy for $84 (Reg. $120)

What we love

If you’re looking to expand your own or a loved one’s LEGO Super Mario collection, this Bowser Express Train set would make a great gift to do so, especially with $36 cut from the tag. There are tons of interactive features here, like the lever-operated spinning platform and super star block, a cannon wagon with a spring-loaded shooter, and more. items.title: Ninja’s Double Stack XL oven provides 12-in-1 functionality within two independent oven zones for a new $230 low

Update 6/16: Amazon has dropped the price even further on this Ninja 12-in-1 Double Stack Oven Combo to a new all-time $230 low ahead of Prime Day.

Amazon is currently offering the Ninja Double Stack XL 12-in-1 Countertop Oven Combo for $249.99 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. It’s down from a $430 full price, with the discounts we’ve tracked in its history typically taking the costs down between $300 and $250. The deal here is a 42% markdown that cuts $180 off the tag for another shot at the all-time lowest price we have tracked. You can also find a large number of the brand’s other cooking appliance deals in the official Amazon storefront here.
